channel.title: L Shaped on Kitchen Remodel Ideas
channel.description: Recent content in L Shaped on Kitchen Remodel Ideas

item.title: L Shaped Compact Kitchen Floor Plan
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 108 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: “Hard flooring surfaces can be cold underfoot any time of year, but are especially so when the weather gets cooler. Who wouldn’t enjoy the comfort of a WarmlyYours radiant in-floor heating system in their home?

item.title: L Shaped Kitchen and Countertop
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 344 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Floor Heating Cable: “The WarmlyYours TempZone™ 3.7-Watt Floor Heating Cable allows you to bring radiant warmth to any room. TempZone™ Floor Heating Cable (Twin) is ultra-low EMF by design.

item.title: L Shaped Open Kitchen Floor Plan
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Exposed Concrete Floor (New Pour) Subfloor: Newly Poured Indoor Concrete Slab Insulation Surface: 169 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Slab Heat Cables: “Are you considering installing heated concrete floors in your home? Even if you aren’t building a new home, perhaps you’re thinking about adding a sunroom or garage to your house.

item.title: Small L Shaped Kitchen
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 86 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: “The WarmlyYours TempZone™ 3.7-Watt Floor Heating Cable allows you to bring radiant warmth to any room. TempZone™ Floor Heating Cable (Twin) is ultra-low EMF by design. It features a twin conductor with a 15’ cold lead and is available in two voltage options and a range of lengths to meet the requirements of any installation.

item.title: Spacious L Shaped Kitchen
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 215 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Roll: “Add radiant warmth to your tile and stone floors with WarmlyYours TempZone™ Flex Rolls. These 240 VAC floor heating rolls feature a 1/8” TempZone™ heating cable, affixed to a mesh fabric backing in a serpentine pattern to evenly distribute heat across the floor.

item.title: L Shaped Kitchen with Laminate Wood
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Laminate Wood (Click-Together Flooring) Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 135 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V Installation Options: Environ™ Flex Rolls: “WarmlyYours Environ Flex Rolls are designed for use under carpet*, laminate and floating wood. The mats can be installed easily and quickly for large spaces. Environ Flex Rolls are flexible rolls that can be cut and turned at 90° or 180° to cover the total area intended to be heated.
